preferred_name_ml.fr: Jauge de pression à joint à diaphragme

definition: gauge pressure gauge equipped with a diaphragm seal that isolates the measuring instrument from the process medium but transmits pressure effects to its sensing element

definition_ml.en: gauge pressure gauge equipped with a diaphragm seal that isolates the measuring instrument from the process medium but transmits pressure effects to its sensing element
definition_ml.fr: jauge de pression manométrique équipée d'un joint à diaphragme qui isole l'instrument de mesure du milieu de traitement mais qui transmet les effets de la pression à son élément de détection
definition_ml.de: Überdruckmanometer, das mit einer Membranabdichtung ausgestattet ist, die das Messgerät vom Prozessmedium isoliert, jedoch Druckauswirkung auf seine Messgrößenaufnehmer überträgt

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: gauge pressure gauge equipped with a diaphragm seal that isolates the measuring instrument from the process medium but transmits pressure effects to its sensing element
